dimensions.name: delete_integrity
dimensions.description: Flags partial multi-delete writes with request id, expected count, requested count, and accepted count.
dimensions.pass_condition: Every detected multi-delete turn has requested and accepted delete counts greater than or equal to expected deletions.

dimensions.name: active_state_grounding
dimensions.description: Reports preferred_name, current_owner, and cofounder through current-state lookup when human id is available.
dimensions.pass_condition: Doctor distinguishes active profile facts from historical mentions.

dimensions.name: telegram_actionability
dimensions.description: Telegram output gives a concise status, topic, active profile summary, problem, and next step.
dimensions.pass_condition: Natural commands route to Memory Doctor and return a bounded reply.
